title.tr: BSOD Derin Analiz - WinDbg ile (Microsoft Learn)

risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'Analyze a Kernel-Mode Dump File by Using WinDbg' (18 Tem 2025 guncel) belgesinden alinmistir. Yalnizca dump dosyalari acilir, sisteme yazma yoktur. Symbol path Microsoft public sembol sunucusuna baglanir.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'Analyze a Kernel-Mode Dump File by Using WinDbg' (updated 2025-07-18). Read-only on dump files, no system writes. Symbol path connects to Microsoft public symbol server.

prerequisites.tr: BSOD sonrasi en az bir minidump (C:\Windows\Minidump altinda)
prerequisites.en: At least one minidump after a BSOD (in C:\Windows\Minidump)

prerequisites.tr: Windows SDK / Debugging Tools for Windows yuklu
prerequisites.en: Windows SDK / Debugging Tools for Windows installed

body.tr: Microsoft: Small (256 KB) %SystemRoot%\Minidump\, Kernel/Automatic %SystemRoot%\MEMORY.DMP, Complete %SystemRoot%\MEMORY.DMP. Microsoft alintisi: 'Dump files generally end with the extension .dmp or .mdmp. You can use network shares or Universal Naming Convention file names for the memory dump file.'
body.en: Microsoft: Small (256 KB) %SystemRoot%\Minidump\, Kernel/Automatic %SystemRoot%\MEMORY.DMP, Complete %SystemRoot%\MEMORY.DMP. Microsoft quote: 'Dump files generally end with the extension .dmp or .mdmp. You can use network shares or Universal Naming Convention file names for the memory dump file.'

body.tr: Windows SDK indirici calistir, kurulumda 'Debugging Tools for Windows' kutusunu sec. Veya Microsoft Store'dan 'WinDbg Preview' yukle - daha modern UI ayni motor.
body.en: Run Windows SDK installer, in installer pick 'Debugging Tools for Windows' checkbox. Or install 'WinDbg Preview' from Microsoft Store - modern UI, same engine.

title.tr: Symbol path ayarlama (Microsoft public symbol server)
title.en: Configure symbol path (Microsoft public symbol server)

body.tr: WinDbg'de File > Symbol File Path acin. Sunucu adresi: https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols. Yerel cache eklemek isterseniz: srv*c:\symbols*https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols
body.en: In WinDbg open File > Symbol File Path. Server URL: https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols. To add local cache: srv*c:\symbols*https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols

title.tr: Komut satirindan WinDbg ile dump ac
title.en: Open dump with WinDbg from command line

body.tr: Microsoft alintisi: 'In most cases, begin by using !analyze. This extension command performs automatic analysis of the dump file, which often provides useful information.' WinDbg prompt'unda yaz: !analyze -v. STACK_TEXT bolumunde crash'e sebep olan DLL/servis gorulur. IMAGE_NAME satiri sucluyu gosterir.
body.en: Microsoft quote: 'In most cases, begin by using !analyze. This extension command performs automatic analysis of the dump file, which often provides useful information.' At WinDbg prompt: !analyze -v. STACK_TEXT section shows the DLL/service that caused the crash. IMAGE_NAME line names the culprit.

body.tr: !analyze (otomatik analiz), .bugcheck (bug check kodu + parametreler), lm (yuklu moduller), !process 0 0 (process listesi), !process 0 7 (detayli process), !vm (sanal bellek), !errlog (sistem error log), !locks (kilitler).
body.en: !analyze (auto analysis), .bugcheck (bug check code + params), lm (loaded modules), !process 0 0 (process list), !process 0 7 (detailed processes), !vm (virtual memory), !errlog (system error log), !locks (locks).

body.tr: WinDbg agir ise NirSoft BlueScreenView hizli ozet verir. Tablo: 'Caused By Driver' kolonu suclu surucuyu gosterir. Microsoft destekli yontem DEGIL ama populerdir - sonucu Microsoft WinDbg ile dogrulamak iyi olur.
body.en: If WinDbg is heavy, NirSoft BlueScreenView gives a quick summary. Table: 'Caused By Driver' column shows the culprit. NOT a Microsoft-supported method but popular - verify the finding with Microsoft WinDbg.
